description: Joe McCann discusses his background in technology and trading, his involvement in the Solana ecosystem, and the potential of decentralized applications. He shares insights on the evolution of programming models and the importance of developer engagement in the crypto space.
topic_summary: In this session, Joe McCann explores the Solana ecosystem, his experiences with crypto, and the future of decentralized applications. He emphasizes the significance of developer activity and the advantages of Solana over other platforms like Ethereum [t=0:00-1:30].
